title: Xtra Buttery Italian Scotch Bonnet Frittata
description: A rich and spicy Italian frittata featuring scotch bonnet peppers, perfect for a brunch mood, with a buttery and crumbly texture from the tadka and dash-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped scotch bonnet peppers and cook for 2 minutes, until fragrant.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, grana padano cheese, italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked peppers in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes, until the edges are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and top with cherry tomatoes.
Return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, until the tomatoes are tender.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve hot, garnished with additional grana padano cheese if desired.
